projects.title: GenAI RAG-Based Chatbot
projects.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation chatbot with semantic search and scalable inference pipeline
details: Built end-to-end RAG pipeline using LangChain and Hugging Face transformer models
Implemented document ingestion, embedding generation, and vector-based similarity search
Improved response relevance with prompt chaining and context management to reduce hallucinations
projects.tech: Python, LangChain, Hugging Face, Vector Search, NLP, Embeddings

projects.title: Eagle
projects.description: Alumni networking platform with role-based access and event management features
details: Designed RESTful APIs supporting secure role-based access control and event workflows
Optimized database queries and performed consistency checks to improve scalability and response time
Developed responsive web interfaces enabling seamless frontend-backend integration
projects.tech: React, Node.js, REST APIs, PostgreSQL, JavaScript

projects.title: Patient Obligation Perceiver Using Eye Gestures
projects.description: Research-driven intelligent system using real-time eye gesture recognition
details: Developed application logic and integrated real-time data processing pipelines
Improved system reliability and validation through continuous data analysis workflows
Co-authored research publication and contributed to an IEEE-granted patent
projects.tech: Python, Computer Vision, Machine Learning, Real-Time Processing
